title: Absorbing Complexity: An Interaction-Native Knowledge Harness for Financial LLM Agents
version_and_withdrawal_check: The immutable v1 arXiv API response contains exactly one normal entry and no withdrawal or retraction notice.
extraction_verification: The extraction is non-empty and UTF-8-readable, contains 17 form-feed page boundaries and no NUL characters, and was inspected at the title/abstract, architecture and algorithm sections, experimental design and metrics, results, references, data schemas, and final reproduction appendix. release_audit.paper_claim: Appendix A.4 states that a released artifact contains configuration files, simulator code, synthetic data, result tables, and figure-generation scripts and gives the command python scripts/run_synthetic_suite.py.
